examples: Then there are the taste receptors, and finally, the smell, activated when we inhale.
Provine realized that the reason chimps cannot emit a string of "ho ho ho" is that they cannot make more than a single sound when they exhale or inhale.
Generally, you exhale on the effort, if doing weights, karate or boxing, and inhale on the return.
We wrinkle our noses, gag, perhaps get hungry or sexually aroused, or inhale more deeply.
He would wake up in eastern Baghdad, inhale its bitter, burning air, and say it.
